strengths: ~15 years of polyglot full-stack engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput micro-services
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform deployable on Kubernetes, showing product ownership and infra fluency
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq
concerns: No advanced degree in AI and no recognized AI products or platforms shipped at scale
Career framed as senior IC / craftsman rather than director-level strategist advising executives and partners
Cloud experience is limited (AWS CDK at Optilyz, K8s for own project); no deep multi-cloud or hyperscaler platform track record

key_factors.factor: Demonstrated AI expertise and shipped AI products
Director-level strategy and external advisory experience
Breadth of full-stack and infra engineering over 15 years

response.justification: The role demands a director-level IC with recognized AI expertise, shipped AI products, deep cloud fluency, and the gravitas to advise strategic customers. The candidate has solid 15-year breadth and recent MCP/agentic tooling work at re:cinq, but the résumé shows no AI-related advanced degree, no flagship AI product, and no evidence of advising strategic customers or shaping cloud product futures. Cloud experience is present but modest (AWS CDK, self-hosted Kubernetes). Strong senior engineer, but the seniority and AI-strategy bar is not met.
